Measured against a real edit overlay (a transient uncommitted spec.md line on graph-stats, surfaced as this worktree's 'edited' overlay op, reverted after). The edit tab LEADS (tab 1 of edit/spec/history/issues/eval) and renders the node's pending unified spec.md diff ('spec line diff', added line highlighted, header 'uncommitted'). Toggling spec<->edit 4x (32 rapid ~45ms samples): the diff reappears immediately every time — loading placeholder never appeared (flashSeen=false) and the pane never blanked (blankSeen=false). Same instant feel as the memoised tabs. Fixture reverted, overlay cleared; tree clean at filing.
